title: Administer infrastructure resources in Azure
summary: This learning path teaches how to create and customize Windows and Linux virtual machines, connect them to virtual networks, and keep them updated.

sections.title: Administer infrastructure resources in Azure
sections.summary: This learning path teaches how to create and customize Windows and Linux virtual machines, connect them to virtual networks, and keep them updated.

lessons.title: Introduction to Azure virtual machines
lessons.content_md:
Learn about the decisions you make before creating a virtual machine, the options to create and manage the VM, and the extensions and services you use to manage your VM.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-azure-virtual-machines/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Plan your Linux environment in Azure
lessons.content_md:
Learn about standards and practices for planning, deploying, managing, and optimizing Linux VMs in Azure.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/plan-your-linux-environment-in-azure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Plan your Linux environment in Azure

lessons.title: Provisioning a Linux virtual machine in Microsoft Azure
lessons.content_md:
Learn about different methods of provisioning Linux virtual machines in Microsoft Azure.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/provision-linux-virtual-machine-in-azure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Provisioning a Linux virtual machine in Microsoft Azure

lessons.title: Create a Windows virtual machine in Azure
lessons.content_md:
Learn to create an Azure virtual machine in minutes that can be used like a local physical desktop or server.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/create-windows-virtual-machine-in-azure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Create a Windows virtual machine in Azure

lessons.title: Manage virtual machines with the Azure CLI
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use the cross-platform Azure CLI to create, start, stop, and perform other management tasks related to virtual machines in Azure.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-virtual-machines-with-azure-cli/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage virtual machines with the Azure CLI

lessons.title: Deploy Azure infrastructure by using JSON ARM templates
lessons.content_md:
Write JSON Azure Resource Manager templates by using Visual Studio Code to deploy your infrastructure to Azure consistently and reliably.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/create-azure-resource-manager-template-vs-code/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Deploy Azure infrastructure by using JSON ARM templates

lessons.title: Add and size disks in Azure virtual machines
lessons.content_md:
Learn about your virtual machine storage options and how to choose between standard and premium, managed and unmanaged disks for your Azure virtual machine.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/add-and-size-disks-in-azure-virtual-machines/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Add and size disks in Azure virtual machines

lessons.title: Monitor your Azure virtual machines with Azure Monitor
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to monitor your Azure VMs by using Azure Monitor to collect and analyze VM host and client metrics and logs.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/monitor-azure-vm-using-diagnostic-data/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Monitor your Azure virtual machines with Azure Monitor

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Administer infrastructure resources in Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Administer infrastructure resources in Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
